global.description: The ad features a modern abstract design with bold text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting new seasonal hits from StarVault.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract shapes in soft pink tones, including circles and squares, arranged in the center.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Additional abstract shapes in light pink, overlapping with other elements, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A large pink rectangle with rounded edges, positioned centrally, giving a modern feel.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Another large pink rectangle, similar to ID 3, contributing to the overall abstract design.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small pink circle located towards the bottom of the ad, adding to the abstract theme.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: Another small pink circle, slightly larger than ID 5, positioned near the bottom.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A tiny pink circle located at the very bottom, completing the abstract design.

elements.label: main message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'A new season drops New hits every week', prominently displayed at the bottom.
elements.text_content: new season drops New hits every week

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The word 'StarVault' in large, bold black font at the top, indicating the brand name.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A white button with the text 'Shop now' in bold, inviting users to take action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centrally positioned, and the CTA is at the bottom.
